Class ReportController

java.lang.Object
Controllers.ReportController
Direct Known Subclasses:
SubscribersReportController, TimesReportController
public abstract class ReportController extends Object
Abstract base controller for generating and displaying reports. Handles BarChart visualization, chart updates, report title management, and navigation back to the Manager UI.

  • Method Details

    • getReportType

      protected abstract ReportType getReportType()
      Returns the type of report this controller represents. Must be implemented by subclasses.
      Returns:
      the report type

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Initializes the controller. Clears the report title.

    • showLineChart

      public void showLineChart(javafx.scene.chart.XYChart.Series<String,Number> series, String title)
      Displays a line chart with the given data series and title. Resets the view before showing the chart.
      Parameters:
      series - the data series to display
      title - the title of the chart

    • showBarChart

      public void showBarChart(javafx.scene.chart.XYChart.Series<String,Number> series, String title)
      Displays a bar chart with the given data series and title. Resets the view before showing the chart.
      Parameters:
      series - the data series to display
      title - the title of the chart

    • resetView

      private void resetView()
      Resets the main bar chart view by hiding it and clearing its data.

      arrivalsChart - the chart to set

    • onPreviousPage

      private void onPreviousPage()
      Navigates back to the Manager UI.

    • showError

      public void showError(String msg)
      Displays an error message to the user. Empty implementation; can be overridden by subclasses.
      Parameters:
      msg - the error message

    • showInfo

      public void showInfo(String msg)
      Displays an informational message to the user. Empty implementation; can be overridden by subclasses.
      Parameters:
      msg - the information message
